final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [4-1:1-1] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
            if (count == 4'b1111) begin
                count <= 4'b0;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
